title: God's Pencil
overview: The gang goes shopping and discovers the story behind Kitsaragi's "special" pencil set.

title: Onigokko Collage
overview: The girls learn about collages, and play a game of freeze, and later color, tag in the process.

title: The one who left behind the photo and wit
overview: The group learns about photography, and what it takes to get a great shot.

title: Designs for Living & Club President's Little Cottage
overview: The gang works on "life art" which they find to be the application of art to everyday consumer products.

title: Art Club Residence
overview: The girls discover a "haunted" portion of the school, only to find out that it was an elaborate prank by the art club.

title: Trompe-l'oeil
overview: The group visits a local art museum and learns a lot during their visit.

title: Surrealism
overview: The gang learns about surrealism all the while poor Kitsaragi is suffering from being tired and having surrealistic dreams in the meantime.

title: Stormy Daydream
overview: The girls have some fun around the school while the weather gets windy.

title: The Assignment is 'The Border Between Life and Death'
Happy Ending
overview: The art club is given an offer to do a set of pictures for a local elementary school's story time.

title: Hexenkessel
overview: After discovering that Namiko is staying home sick for the day, the group tries to cope without her. After her return the girls have a sleepover so that they can get their projects completed on time, but due to a off-the-wall dinner not much gets done.
